CVE-2021-44228.title: Log4Shell — Apache Log4j Remote Code Execution
CVE-2021-44228.description: Apache Log4j2 2.0-beta9 through 2.15.0 JNDI features do not protect against attacker-controlled LDAP and other JNDI related endpoints, allowing remote code execution.
CVE-2021-44228.remediation: Update to Apache Log4j 2.17.1 or later. Remove JndiLookup class from classpath.

CVE-2021-34527.title: PrintNightmare — Windows Print Spooler RCE
CVE-2021-34527.description: Windows Print Spooler service improperly performs privileged file operations, allowing remote code execution with SYSTEM privileges.
CVE-2021-34527.remediation: Apply Microsoft security update KB5004945. Disable Print Spooler service if not needed.

CVE-2017-0144.title: EternalBlue — SMB Remote Code Execution
CVE-2017-0144.description: The SMBv1 server in Microsoft Windows allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via crafted packets (EternalBlue).
CVE-2017-0144.remediation: Apply Microsoft MS17-010 patch. Disable SMBv1 protocol.

CVE-2019-0708.title: BlueKeep — RDP Remote Code Execution
CVE-2019-0708.description: A remote code execution vulnerability exists in Remote Desktop Services when an unauthenticated attacker sends specially crafted requests (BlueKeep).
CVE-2019-0708.remediation: Apply Microsoft security update. Enable Network Level Authentication. Disable RDP if not needed.

CVE-2014-0160.title: Heartbleed — OpenSSL Information Disclosure
CVE-2014-0160.description: The TLS heartbeat extension in OpenSSL 1.0.1 through 1.0.1f allows remote attackers to read sensitive memory (Heartbleed).
CVE-2014-0160.remediation: Update OpenSSL to 1.0.1g or later. Revoke and reissue all SSL certificates.

CVE-2021-41773.title: Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49 Path Traversal
CVE-2021-41773.description: A path traversal and file disclosure vulnerability in Apache HTTP Server 2.4.49 allows attackers to map URLs to files outside the expected document root.
CVE-2021-41773.remediation: Update Apache HTTP Server to 2.4.51 or later.

CVE-2017-5638.title: Apache Struts 2 Remote Code Execution
CVE-2017-5638.description: Apache Struts 2.3.x before 2.3.32 and 2.5.x before 2.5.10.1 allows remote code execution via a crafted Content-Type header.
CVE-2017-5638.remediation: Update Apache Struts to 2.3.32 or 2.5.10.1 or later.

CVE-2018-11776.title: Apache Struts 2 Namespace RCE
CVE-2018-11776.description: Apache Struts versions 2.3 to 2.3.34 and 2.5 to 2.5.16 allow remote code execution when namespace value is not set for results with no namespace.
CVE-2018-11776.remediation: Update Apache Struts to 2.3.35 or 2.5.17 or later.

CVE-2011-2523.title: VSFTPD 2.3.4 Backdoor Command Execution
CVE-2011-2523.description: vsftpd 2.3.4 contains a backdoor that opens a shell on port 6200 when a username containing :) is used.
CVE-2011-2523.remediation: Remove compromised vsftpd 2.3.4. Install a clean version from official source.

CVE-2017-7494.title: SambaCry — Samba Remote Code Execution
CVE-2017-7494.description: Samba 3.5.0 onwards is vulnerable to remote code execution by a malicious client uploading a shared library to a writable share.
CVE-2017-7494.remediation: Update Samba to 4.6.4, 4.5.10, or 4.4.14 or later. Add 'nt pipe support = no' to smb.conf.

CVE-2016-6210.title: OpenSSH User Enumeration
CVE-2016-6210.description: OpenSSH before 7.3 is vulnerable to user enumeration via timing differences in authentication responses.

CVE-2020-10188.title: Telnet Remote Code Execution
CVE-2020-10188.description: Telnetd in netkit telnet through 0.17 allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via short writes or urgent data.
CVE-2020-10188.remediation: Disable telnet service. Use SSH for remote administration instead.

CVE-2014-6271.title: Shellshock — GNU Bash Remote Code Execution
CVE-2014-6271.description: GNU Bash through 4.3 processes trailing strings after function definitions in environment variables, allowing remote code execution.
CVE-2014-6271.remediation: Update GNU Bash to 4.3 patch 25 or later.

CVE-2016-6662.title: MySQL Remote Code Execution
CVE-2016-6662.description: Oracle MySQL before 5.5.52, 5.6.x before 5.6.33, and 5.7.x before 5.7.15 allows remote code execution via manipulated config files.
CVE-2016-6662.remediation: Update MySQL to 5.5.52, 5.6.33, 5.7.15 or later. Restrict FILE privilege.

CVE-2017-12617.title: Apache Tomcat Remote Code Execution via PUT
CVE-2017-12617.description: Apache Tomcat 7.0.0 to 7.0.79 and 8.0.0-RC1 to 8.0.44 allows remote code execution via a crafted PUT request with a JSP file.
CVE-2017-12617.remediation: Update Apache Tomcat to 7.0.82 or 8.0.47 or later. Disable PUT method.

CVE-2014-3566.title: POODLE — SSLv3 Padding Oracle Attack
CVE-2014-3566.description: The SSL protocol 3.0, as used in OpenSSL and other products, uses nondeterministic CBC padding which makes it easier for man-in-the-middle attackers to obtain cleartext data via a padding-oracle attack (POODLE).
CVE-2014-3566.remediation: Disable SSLv3 on all servers and clients. Use TLS 1.2 or higher. Enable TLS_FALLBACK_SCSV.

CVE-2015-4000.title: Logjam — TLS DHE Export Downgrade
CVE-2015-4000.description: The TLS protocol could allow a man-in-the-middle attacker to downgrade vulnerable TLS connections using DHE_EXPORT ciphers to 512-bit export-grade cryptography (Logjam attack).
CVE-2015-4000.remediation: Disable DHE_EXPORT cipher suites. Use 2048-bit or larger DH groups. Upgrade to TLS 1.2+.

CVE-2007-6750.title: Slowloris — HTTP Denial of Service
CVE-2007-6750.description: Apache httpd allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service via incomplete HTTP requests, keeping connections open and exhausting the server's connection pool (Slowloris).
CVE-2007-6750.remediation: Configure request timeout limits. Use mod_reqtimeout. Deploy a reverse proxy or load balancer with connection limits.

CVE-2010-4344.title: Exim SMTP Heap Overflow Remote Code Execution
CVE-2010-4344.description: Heap-based buffer overflow in the smtp_respond function in Exim 4.70 and earlier allows remote attackers to execute arbitrary code via long SMTP command arguments.
CVE-2010-4344.remediation: Upgrade Exim to version 4.73 or later. Restrict SMTP access to trusted hosts.

CVE-2010-0425.title: Apache mod_isapi Dangling Pointer
CVE-2010-0425.description: Apache HTTP Server mod_isapi allows remote attackers to cause a denial of service or execute arbitrary code via a request that triggers a module unload while another request is being processed.
CVE-2010-0425.remediation: Upgrade Apache HTTP Server. Remove mod_isapi if not needed.
